title: Bare Bones x Fresh Animations: Objects
description: FA: Objects compatible with Bare Bones !
body:
![Bare Bones x FA: Objects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/967a2a484c2fb483264210ad973e6f88a4b3b1d5.png)
-----------

You can now use [Fresh Animations: Objects](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations-objects) by [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX) with Bare Bones !

The resource pack is to place above the default Fresh Animations: Objects in the list
